title: Brazilian E-Commerce Sales Analysis
description: End-to-end analytics pipeline on 9-CSV relational data in SQL Server 2022. Built delivery delta metrics, shipping-to-price ratios, NLP sentiment scoring on reviews, and a scikit-learn regression model powering an interactive Power BI dashboard.

title: Hospital Patients Operational & Financial Analysis
description: SQL-driven clinical efficiency audit across admissions and procedures. Used CTEs and window functions to segment patient demographics, flag LOS outliers, detect orphan records, and analyze insurance claims data.

title: Automated Machine Learning Solutions (100-Day Streak)
description: Active repository of production-ready ML pipelines built across 100+ consecutive days. Covers end-to-end preprocessing, missing value imputation, feature engineering, and scikit-learn classification and regression models.

title: Excel RFM Customer Segmentation & Churn Analysis
description: Extracted RFM metrics from historical transaction data using SQL window functions. Classified customers into Champions, At-Risk, and Hibernating cohorts to catch churn early, mapped into an Excel dashboard with dynamic pivot tables and slicers.

title: Job Postings Data Science Market Analysis
description: EDA project analyzing tech recruitment trends from web-scraped job board data. Used pandas and Regex to deduplicate records, normalize geo-metadata, and map global tech stack demand and salary distributions across remote vs. on-site roles.
